description_long: This object is a single, whole lemon with a bright yellow, slightly glossy peel and a characteristic oval shape. The surface is dimpled and uneven, with small natural bumps and a few subtle wrinkles, typical of citrus fruit. One end of the lemon features a small protruding nub, while the opposite end is slightly indented. A commercial sticker with a barcode and text is affixed to one side, indicating it is store-bought. The peel appears intact and unbroken, with no visible cracks or peeling. The lemon's size and appearance are consistent with those commonly found in grocery stores or urban markets.
description: A bright yellow, oval lemon with a dimpled, glossy peel and a store sticker on one side.
description_view_0: This view shows the lemon's rounded side with a smooth, dimpled yellow peel and no visible sticker.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the lemon's protruding nub and a more textured, slightly wrinkled surface.
description_view_2: The lemon's side is visible with the sticker partially in view, showing the transition from smooth to slightly bumpy peel.
description_view_3: This view prominently displays the commercial sticker and the indented end of the lemon.
attribute_peel_condition: The peel is intact, dimpled, and slightly glossy with minor natural wrinkles and no visible cracks or peeling.
